context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Waste product that accumulates on cage floor, triggers dirty state when 3+ present
context.screen_position: Randomly spawns on cage floor area at y=110-125px, x=random within 0-126px. Maximum 5 visible at once.
adjacent_elements: echo_dirty (Echo enters this state when 3+ poop present)
context.usage_scenario: Spawns automatically every 20 minutes during gameplay. When count reaches 3+, Echo becomes dirty. Player swipes cage floor to remove all poop at once, triggering sparkle effect and returning Echo to idle state.

visual_specification.shape: Small irregular blob representing bird droppings. 2x2px with 1-2 pixels slightly offset to create organic irregular shape.
visual_specification.texture: Pure pixel art, simple solid color

animation.description: Static sprite. Appears instantly when spawned, disappears instantly when cleaned (no fade).

visual_specification.details: 2x2px base shape in #AB5236. Can have 1 pixel extending to make 3px total for irregular organic look. Each poop instance positioned randomly on floor (y=110-125px, x=random). Maximum 5 poop objects visible simultaneously. All poop removed simultaneously when player swipes floor.

relationships.shared_with: Same brown color (#AB5236) as wooden elements (perch, bowls)
relationships.differences_from: Unlike seed: brown color (not golden), appears on floor (not in bowl), removed by cleaning (not consumed). Unlike particles: static object, not animated, persists until cleaned.

explicit_negations: No stink lines or smell effects
